title: Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery
tagline: Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery — spiritual town of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery, West Bengal

overview.short: Ging Gompa (also known as Sangchen Thongdrol Ling) (Tibetan: གསང་ཆེན་མཐོང་གྲོལ་གླིང) is a Buddhist monastery in Darjeeling, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Ging Gompa (also known as Sangchen Thongdrol Ling) (Tibetan: གསང་ཆེན་མཐོང་གྲོལ་གླིང) is a Buddhist monastery in Darjeeling, West Bengal, India. The monastery is located in Ging, about 10 km (6.2 mi) from Darjeeling. It is one of the oldest monasteries in Darjeeling and subscribes to the Nyingmapa tradition of Tibetan Buddhism. On historical grounds, the monastery is still under the administrative control of the Government of Sikkim.

topPlaces.name: Phoobsering Tea Estate
topPlaces.description: Phoobsering Tea Estate is a tea garden in the Darjeeling Pulbazar in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Ging Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Ging Tea Garden is a census town in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Badamtam Tea Estate
topPlaces.description: Badamtam Tea Estate is a tea garden in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Badamtam Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Badamtam Tea Garden is a census town and a gram panchayat in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: North Tukvar Tea Estate
topPlaces.description: North Tukvar Tea Estate (also known as Singla Tea Estate) is a tea garden in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Pattabong Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Pattabong Tea Garden (also spelled Puttabong) is a village in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Puttabong Tea Estate
topPlaces.description: Puttabong Tea Estate (formerly known as Tukvar Tea Estate) is a tea garden in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Gorkha Stadium
topPlaces.description: Gorkha Stadium is a multi-purpose stadium in Lebong, Darjeeling, India. It has a seating capacity of 15,000, and is used for football (most notably Darjeeling Gold Cup), cricket, and various events.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery?
faq.a: Stays in Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sangchhen Thong Delling monastery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Phoobsering Tea Estate, Ging Tea Garden, Badamtam Tea Estate, Badamtam Tea Garden, North Tukvar Tea Estate.
